positive: A mystical, stylized forest scene featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central focus is a majestic, glowing stag silhouette against a deep twilight background. Accent elements include swirling nebulae effects and intricate, abstract geometric patterns derived from nature (e.g., fern veins, crystalline structures). Use a dramatic, high-contrast color palette of deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and electric cyan accents, giving it a clean, ethereal glow. The composition must be centered, designed as a seamless, repeating tapestry suitable for screen printing on fabric. Clean lines, sharp edges, graphic novel illustration style, highly detailed, UHD, flat color blocks with gradients.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, artifact, blurry, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, cropped, low detail, noisy, grain, out of focus, extra limbs, extra fingers
